1.author: Ahmed Ali
1.text: SAY: "I SEEK refuge with the Lord of men,

1.author: Ahmed Raza Khan
1.text: Proclaim (O dear Prophet Mohammed – peace and blessings be upon him), “I take refuge of the One Who is the Lord of all mankind.”

1.author: Arberry
1.text: Say: 'I take refuge with the Lord of men,

1.author: Daryabadi
1.text: Say thou: I seek refuge with the Lord of mankind,

1.author: Hilali & Khan
1.text: Say: "I seek refuge with (Allah) the Lord of mankind,

1.author: Itani
1.text: Say, “I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind.

1.author: Maududi
1.text: Say: “I seek refuge with the Lord of mankind;

1.author: Mubarakpuri
1.text: Say: "I seek refuge with the Lord of An-Nas,"

1.author: Pickthall
1.text: Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind,

1.author: Qarai
1.text: Say, ‘I seek the protection of the Lord of humans,

1.author: Qaribullah & Darwish
1.text: Say: 'I take refuge with the Lord of people,

1.author: Saheeh International
1.text: Say, "I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind,

1.author: Sarwar
1.text: (Muhammad), say, "I seek protection from the Cherisher of mankind,

1.author: Shakir
1.text: Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of men,

1.author: Wahiduddin Khan
1.text: Say, "I seek refuge in the Lord of people,

1.author: Yusuf Ali
1.text: Say: I seek refuge with the Lord and Cherisher of Mankind,

4.author: Ahmed Ali
4.text: From the evil of him who breathes temptations into the minds of men,

4.author: Ahmed Raza Khan
4.text: “From the evil of the one who instils evil thoughts in the hearts – and stays hidden.”

4.author: Arberry
4.text: from the evil of the slinking whisperer

4.author: Daryabadi
4.text: From the evil of the sneaking whisperer

4.author: Hilali & Khan
4.text: "From the evil of the whisperer (devil who whispers evil in the hearts of men) who withdraws (from his whispering in one's heart after one remembers Allah),

4.author: Itani
4.text: From the evil of the sneaky whisperer.

4.author: Maududi
4.text: from the mischief of the whispering, elusive prompter who returns again and again,

4.author: Mubarakpuri
4.text: "From the evil of the whisperer who withdraws."

4.author: Pickthall
4.text: From the evil of the sneaking whisperer,

4.author: Qarai
4.text: from the evil of the sneaky tempter

4.author: Qaribullah & Darwish
4.text: from the evil of the slinking whisperer.

4.author: Saheeh International
4.text: From the evil of the retreating whisperer -

4.author: Sarwar
4.text: against the evil of the temptations of the satans,

4.author: Shakir
4.text: From the evil of the whisperings of the slinking (Shaitan),

4.author: Wahiduddin Khan
4.text: from the mischief of every sneaking whis-perer,

4.author: Yusuf Ali
4.text: From the mischief of the Whisperer (of Evil), who withdraws (after his whisper),-

5.author: Ahmed Ali
5.text: Who suggests evil thoughts to the hearts of men --

5.author: Ahmed Raza Khan
5.text: “Those who instil evil thoughts into the hearts of men.”

5.author: Arberry
5.text: who whispers in the breasts of men

5.author: Daryabadi
5.text: Who whispereth Unto the breasts of mankind,

5.author: Hilali & Khan
5.text: "Who whispers in the breasts of mankind,

5.author: Itani
5.text: Who whispers into the hearts of people.

5.author: Maududi
5.text: who whispers in the hearts of people;

5.author: Mubarakpuri
5.text: "Who whispers in the breasts of An-Nas."

5.author: Pickthall
5.text: Who whispereth in the hearts of mankind,

5.author: Qarai
5.text: who puts temptations into the breasts of humans,

5.author: Qaribullah & Darwish
5.text: who whispers in the chests of people,

5.author: Saheeh International
5.text: Who whispers [evil] into the breasts of mankind -

5.author: Shakir
5.text: Who whispers into the hearts of men,

5.author: Wahiduddin Khan
5.text: who whispers into the hearts of people,

5.author: Yusuf Ali
5.text: (The same) who whispers into the hearts of Mankind,-

6.author: Ahmed Ali
6.text: From among the jinns and men.

6.author: Daryabadi
6.text: Whether of Jinn or of mankind.

6.author: Itani
6.text: From among jinn and among people.”

6.author: Maududi
6.text: whether he be from the jinn or humans.”

6.author: Pickthall
6.text: Of the jinn and of mankind.

6.author: Qarai
6.text: from among the jinn and humans.’

6.author: Saheeh International
6.text: From among the jinn and mankind."

6.author: Sarwar
6.text: who induce temptation into the hearts of mankind.

6.author: Shakir
6.text: From among the jinn and the men.
